title: Asuka QUESTION
wikitext:
[]: Asuka QUESTION             Quote Post by Hand of God » Tue Apr 05, 2005 8:28 pm I got a question of Asuka, when Shinji masturbated about Asuka in the clinic thingy why did she got there? was it because of depression? cuz I have the last 6 episode and I havenÂ´t seen a reason of her being in the clinic

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Apr 05, 2005 9:21 pm After the fight with the 16th angel, Asuka believed herself worthless and without reason, so her depression caused her to slip into a coma. They don't actually show this happening, but we are told via dialogue. I'm sure someone else can explain it better...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 05, 2005 9:45 pm Asuka also tried to take herself out the Roman way -- without the benefit of warm water to submerge the wounds in.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 06, 2005 12:05 am You could argue that her psychological breakdown is either purely by her own devices, or due to her encounter with the 15th angel Arael, or a combination of the both. In either case, we're dealing with a severe psychological trauma resulting in a catatonic or coma-like state.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Apr 06, 2005 5:01 am wow, i never realised there was blood in that bath before.....something else to creap me out *shudder*

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Apr 06, 2005 9:22 am I didn't notice a cut wrist any one got a screan cap? I thought she was just sitting their wating to die, cuz she fealt worthless.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Apr 06, 2005 9:58 am if you click on 'the roman way' in reichu's message it takes you to it and if you look her wrists are facing down and blood is flowing down the ol' tub. a bit grim :? adds to the story and well, it's eva isn't it

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Apr 06, 2005 11:21 am Humm I always though thats was just crud in the tub. Either way I guss its one of the more f'ed scence in EVA. I've never realy understood sucide as am emotional " out" really. I've always had the opnion that if I had to put up with this world it had to put up with me. Anyone that knows me knows i'm a stuborn bastard that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 06, 2005 1:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: In either case, we're dealing with a severe psychological trauma resulting in a catatonic or coma-like state.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Apr 06, 2005 1:18 pm Screw my notions, Mr. Tines makes a lot more sense. I never even noticed what she had done to her wrists, but now that I see it it's obvious what NERV did.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 06, 2005 1:25 pm I wonder exactly "when" her slide began though. One could argue it began when Shinji usurped her highest synchro rate. That's when her defeats began. I think another important point to look at in that episode is her abject horror at the sight of the blood drenched Bousou Eva 01. Remember her declining synchro rate was a two way street. Both she and the Eva were closing themselves off. Perhaps the eva sensed her revulsion, and may have begun to "shut itself" as Kawrou mentions in eps 24.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2005 1:28 pm Mr. Tines wrote: You've rather taken to that little euphemism that I introduced you to, haven't you.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 06, 2005 2:27 pm For those who haven't seen this discussed at the other place, here is the link ; including bandaging of her wrist- Reichu wrote: Medication, eh? No self-induced coma, then? I suppose that makes a bit more sense... So technically, then, Shinji wouldn't be wanking over the boobies of a COMATOSE 14-year-old girl; rather, she would be SEDATED? For what purpose, though?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Apr 06, 2005 3:56 pm She was missing for a good while and looked very emaciated during that scene as well so I always thought that along with slitting her wrist she also tried to starve herself to death. My mind may be reading things into places they don't belong though.

[]:             Quote Post by Witness1 » Wed Apr 06, 2005 4:05 pm I would like to point out that suicides like "The Roman Way" are more of a cry for help, over trying to kill your self. The idea is that you kill yourself slowly so that there is a chance for somebody to come and save you. Which is exactly what happened with Asuka. I dont really dive much into Asuka's character, but I think that a cry for help suicide does make sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2005 4:22 pm If you do it the way the Romans did, the idea is that you won't be around long enough for anyone to "help" you. I.e., slit wrists, stick them into hot water (so no clotting), then just sit back and it's all a matter of time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 06, 2005 4:46 pm Hunter21 wrote: She was missing for a good while and looked very emaciated during that scene as well

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Apr 06, 2005 7:07 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I wonder exactly "when" her slide began though. One could argue it began when Shinji usurped her highest synchro rate.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 06, 2005 7:16 pm Reichu wrote: OMF, I think the reason Kyoko began to shut herself off may have been due to Arael. I mean, think about it... How is Arael supposed to know that a little person is inside this Eva? Her first target would have been the Eva herself and, upon detecting another sentience inside, would have expanded her, um, "field of interest" to include Asuka. That would seem much more logical than Arael simply ignoring EVA-02 (who has, after all, as much a human mind as Asuka) completely. (It's perhaps noteworthy that Ritsuko says, "Don't allow feedback from Eva" -- but it was obviously too late by that point.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2005 7:53 pm Are you suggesting that Kyoko was NOT mind-hacked by Arael as well? :P
